overview.title: MOTA Pricing Model & Settlement System
overview.subtitle: A hybrid billing architecture combining subscription, prepaid, pay-per-performance, and micropayments with flexible tiered pricing and auditable adjustments.

principles.label: Pay per Performance
principles.desc: Reply Outreach charges by valid CTA Link Clicks — cost tied directly to business outcomes.

principles.label: Three Parallel Streams
principles.desc: Subscription (fixed cost), Report (per-use), Outreach (per-performance) running concurrently.

principles.label: Multiplier System
principles.desc: Platform Tier multipliers (1.0–4.0) reflect operational cost differences; admins can discount/waive/grant.

principles.label: Auditable
principles.desc: All deductions, adjustments, and refunds logged to audit_log and bill_adjustments with mandatory reason recording.

tier-system.title: Subscription / Report / Outreach
tier-system.subtitle: Three parallel business lines covering fixed costs, per-study research, and performance-based outreach.

subscription.summary: Monthly per-project fee covering scanning, proxy, API, and basic AI analysis costs. Project pause stops billing.

report.summary: Pay-per-report for structured market intelligence reports. Serves as a lead generation and pre-sales tool.

outreach.summary: CPA model — charged per valid click generated from community replies. Cost tied to real engagement.
outreach.description: See X402 Micropayment and Platform Commission sections for details

x402.title: X402 Micropayment Mechanism
x402.subtitle: Real-time deduction per valid CTA Link Click. Prepaid deducts Credits, PAYG settles at end of month.

flow.detail: System generates tracking link embedded in community reply
Visitor clicks link to landing page, triggering funnel_events record
Prepaid deducts Project Credits in real time; PAYG adds to monthly invoice
Monthly invoice generation, Stripe batch charge or payment reminder

x402.creditSystem: Project Credits are the core X402 unit — each valid click consumes Credits (adjusted by Tier multiplier). Top-up = Prepaid. When Credits run out, Outreach pauses but scanning continues.

platform-commission.title: Platform Tier Commission Model
platform-commission.subtitle: Tiers reflect platform operating costs. Multiplier affects per-click deduction.

tiers.costReason: Real-time scanning requires near-real-time quota, moderate moderation cost
Requires Playwright headless scraping + anti-bot strategy
High anti-scraping + legal compliance + moderation cost

qa-billing.title: QA Billing & Adjustment Strategy
qa-billing.subtitle: Admins can apply discounts, overrides, waivers, or surcharges at the project level. All adjustments must include a reason.

adjustTypes.desc: Permanent or time-limited discount, percentage or fixed amount
Override platform Tier multiplier for a specific project
Waive fees for a specific period or user

qa-billing.rules: All bill_adjustments must record: operator, reason, amount, type, scope, effective dates, and approval path.

settlement.title: Settlement & Reconciliation
settlement.subtitle: Prepaid real-time consumption, PAYG end-of-month settlement, Stripe main channel, partnership split supported.

methods.name: Prepaid
methods.desc: Customer tops up Project Credits, each valid click deducts in real time. Outreach pauses at zero balance

methods.name: PAYG
methods.desc: Monthly summary of valid clicks × platform multiplier, invoice generated via Stripe

methods.name: Partnership
methods.desc: Stripe Connect auto-split, partners receive agreed percentage

adjustment.title: Admin Adjustment & Audit
adjustment.subtitle: Full audit log — all deductions and adjustments are traceable.
adjustment.notes: Billing summary auto-generated every 6 hours. Outstanding balance over 15 days auto-pauses project Outreach.
